description: Create a comprehensive Security Post Orders (SPO) document for a pharmaceutical research campus client using the site, personnel, and procedural data from /home/ga/Documents/site_security_data.json. Save the multi-section operational reference document as /home/ga/Documents/SPO-HBC-2024-003.odt in Apache OpenOffice Writer. The document must include Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles, an auto-generated Table of Contents, page numbers in the footer, formatted tables for posts, patrols, access levels, contacts, and shifts, and numbered lists for emergency procedures.
